Email Marketing Agent.action: Scrapes current product listings, promotions, and brake part details to use as source material for email content.
Email Marketing Agent.impact: Ensures every email reflects live inventory and accurate product info, reducing customer confusion and support tickets.

Customer Issues Analyzer.action: Pulls all form submissions from the Amazon in-box flyer return and issue forms stored in HubSpot.

R1 DFC Amazon Ads AI.impact: Replaces hours of manual campaign analysis with instant AI-driven insights, improving ad efficiency and reducing wasted spend.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Searches YouTube for content creators matching input keywords, retrieving channel data, subscriber counts, and recent video performance.
Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Instantly surfaces relevant creators at scale, replacing hours of manual platform browsing with structured, keyword-targeted results.

Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Expands creator profiles with cross-platform data, giving a fuller picture of reach and audience engagement beyond YouTube.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Analyzes aggregated creator data from all sources and classifies each creator by niche relevance, audience fit, and content quality signals.
Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Filters a large raw creator pool down to a curated shortlist, saving significant manual vetting time for partnership teams.

Creator Qualifier.action: Scores each discovered creator against customizable weighting criteria such as engagement rate, niche alignment, audience size, and posting consistency.
Creator Qualifier.impact: Produces a ranked, objective creator shortlist in seconds, enabling partnership teams to prioritize outreach without manual scoring spreadsheets.

Creator Outreach.action: Retrieves the qualified creator list and outreach sequence templates stored in Drive documents.
Creator Outreach.impact: Centralizes creator data and messaging playbooks so the agent always works from the latest approved targeting criteria and copy.

Creator Outreach.action: Generates personalized outreach messages for each creator by applying learned prompt sequences to their profile data.
Creator Outreach.impact: Produces individually tailored cold outreach at scale, improving reply rates while eliminating hours of manual copywriting per campaign.

Creator Outreach.action: Sends each personalized outreach email to the corresponding creator and logs delivery status.
Creator Outreach.impact: Automates high-volume creator prospecting outreach without manual send effort, enabling consistent campaign cadences at any scale.

Creator Reponse.action: Loads historical influencer email conversations and negotiation outcomes to provide learned context for the AI.
Creator Reponse.impact: Grounds the AI in real past deal interactions so responses reflect proven negotiation patterns rather than generic replies.

Creator Reponse.action: Reads incoming creator replies and generates contextually appropriate negotiation or follow-up responses based on learned conversation history.

Creator Reponse.action: Monitors the inbox for creator replies and sends the AI-generated negotiation responses back to each creator.
Creator Reponse.impact: Eliminates inbox management overhead and ensures no creator reply goes unanswered, protecting relationship momentum during active negotiations.

Must Have Monday Email Automation.action: Reads the MHM vehicle data and cross-references it against the New Availability Guide to identify matching part numbers and build the load sheet.
Must Have Monday Email Automation.impact: Automates the weekly load sheet matching process that would otherwise require manual part-number lookups across two data sources, saving significant prep time every Monday.

Must Have Monday Email Automation.impact: Gives the marketing team instant visibility into send status without logging into HubSpot, keeping the team informed and accountable.

First to Market Email Automation.action: Generates product launch email copy and monthly recap email content based on new product data and brand guidelines.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Pulls lifecycle stage metrics, contact growth, and email performance data for the reporting period.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Retrieves web traffic, conversion, and session metrics for the reporting period from Google Analytics 4.
Marketing Deck Automation.impact: Populates site performance data automatically, replacing manual GA4 exports and screenshot workflows that consume analyst time monthly.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Writes all collected metrics into slides 48 through 55 of the Marketing Highlights deck, replacing placeholder values with live data.
Marketing Deck Automation.impact: Delivers a fully populated monthly deck section in seconds, saving hours of manual slide updates and eliminating data entry errors across eight slides.

R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.action: Identifies keyword gaps where competitors rank but R1 Concepts does not, surfacing high-opportunity blog topics.

DFC Load Sheet Generator.action: Accepts MHM vehicle part number input and runs matching logic against the embedded New Availability Guide data entirely within the browser.

DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.action: Exports customer sales transaction data including order history, product lines purchased, recency, and revenue for the analysis period.

Super Session Saturday Automation.action: Monitors a designated Teams channel for a new Excel file uploaded by William Nguyen each week.

DFC SEO Blog System.action: Generates fully written B2B SEO blog posts targeting DFC's core audiences — shops, distributors, and fleets — based on keyword briefs and brand guidelines.

Friction Friday Automation.action: Scrapes YouTube for existing Friction Friday-style video references, pulls vehicle images from Bing Images and Wikimedia Commons, and fetches vehicle history and specs from Wikipedia to build a research package.

Friction Friday Automation.action: Converts the Claude-generated script into a natural-sounding voiceover audio file using a consistent branded voice.

DFC Blog Agent Reporting.action: Pulls weekly keyword rankings, impressions, clicks, and average position data for all DFC blog URLs.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Eliminates manual formatting work and ensures every catalog file Mark receives is consistently organized and easy to act on.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Emails the completed Excel catalog file directly to Mark with a summary of what was found and what gaps exist for the submitted vehicle.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Delivers the finished catalog to Mark's inbox within minutes of form submission, replacing a process that previously required manual back-and-forth.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Pulls live inventory status for every part on the weekly backorder report, including on-hand quantity, on-order status, and in-transit shipments.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Replaces a dozen people doing independent manual lookups with a single automated pull, saving hours of duplicated effort every week.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Enriches the backorder report with the live Dream inventory data and automatically flags any parts with no on-hand, no on-order, and no in-transit source as dead-ends.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Gives the team an immediately actionable report with risk clearly flagged, so dead-end parts can be escalated or communicated to customers without delay.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Generates and sends draft customer communications for backordered items, pre-populated with part status, estimated availability, and next steps.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Cuts customer communication prep time dramatically and ensures every affected customer gets a timely, accurate update without staff writing each email from scratch.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Scrapes the online catalogs of Gyro Disc, Alcon, and Brembo to extract make, model, year, and part fitment data for all available two-piece rotors.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Builds a comprehensive competitor fitment reference in minutes that would take days to compile manually from three separate catalog sites.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Cross-references the scraped fitment data against DFC's existing parts catalog and logs matched, unmatched, and gap entries into a structured Google Sheet for Dino.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Instantly reveals where DFC has coverage and where product gaps exist, giving Dino a clear roadmap for sourcing or development decisions.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Sends automated outreach emails to targeted customers asking about their demand for two-piece rotors for specific vehicle applications identified in the gap analysis.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Gathers real demand signal from customers with zero manual outreach effort, feeding the catalog build with market validation data.

Meta Investigation.action: Pulls all active Meta and TikTok ad copy — including headlines, primary text, and descriptions — across every running campaign and ad set.
Meta Investigation.impact: Provides complete visibility into live ad copy at scale, capturing every active variant without anyone manually exporting or reviewing ads one by one.

Meta Investigation.action: Scans all pulled ad copy for specified phrases or flagged terms and produces a precise match list showing the exact ad, field, and copy where each instance was found.
Meta Investigation.impact: Catches compliance risks, off-brand language, or policy violations across hundreds of ads in seconds — a task that would take a human reviewer hours.

Meta Investigation.action: Emails a formatted flagged-copy report listing every match with the exact field, ad name, and copy excerpt so the team can take immediate action.
Meta Investigation.impact: Delivers an actionable audit directly to the right person's inbox on demand, eliminating the need to manually audit the ads manager interface.

Resume Bot.action: Monitors the jobs@r1concepts.com inbox for incoming applications, extracts the resume attachment and applicant details, and triggers the workflow for each new email received.
Resume Bot.impact: Ensures every application is captured and processed immediately, eliminating the risk of candidates being missed in a busy shared inbox.

Resume Bot.action: Saves each resume PDF to an organized folder in Drive, named and filed by candidate and role for easy retrieval during the hiring process.
Resume Bot.impact: Creates a structured, searchable resume archive automatically, replacing ad hoc file saves and ensuring nothing is lost from the inbox.

Resume Bot.action: Reads and scores each resume against the requirements of open roles, classifying each candidate as approved for review, denied, paused due to role status, or flagged for no resume submitted.
Resume Bot.impact: Cuts initial resume screening time to near zero and ensures every candidate gets a consistent, criteria-based evaluation rather than a rushed human skim.

Resume Bot.action: Sends automated reply emails to denied, no-resume, and paused-role candidates, and logs every decision with candidate details and scoring notes to the Sheets dashboard including a dedicated Pending tab for paused applicants.
Resume Bot.impact: Guarantees every applicant receives a timely response while building a complete hiring record that the team can review, filter, and act on from one dashboard.

summary: Our AI automation pipeline continues to grow, now tracking **56 total agents** — 28 completed, 10 in progress, and 18 planned. This week we welcomed one new addition: the **Resume Bot**, which automatically reads incoming resumes from jobs@r1concepts.com, scores candidates against open roles using Claude, files PDFs in Drive, sends appropriate auto-replies, and logs everything to a Sheets dashboard. No agents changed stages this week, but the pipeline remains active and well-stocked with meaningful work ahead. Great momentum across the board — let's keep it rolling! 🚀
